requirements.requirement_text: The gateway shall periodically transmit the vehicle speed to the instrument cluster based on the most recently received data from the engine control module.
The gateway shall maintain the defined scaling, unit, and valid range when forwarding vehicle speed information.
Upon reception of body status information, the gateway shall immediately evaluate the status of all monitored doors.
The gateway shall derive a consolidated door status based on the evaluated individual door indications.
The gateway shall periodically transmit the consolidated door status to the instrument cluster.
Upon reception of body status information, the gateway shall immediately evaluate the status of the turn indicators.
The gateway shall derive a consolidated turn activity status based on the evaluated turn indicator inputs.
The gateway shall periodically transmit the consolidated turn activity status to the instrument cluster.
When the vehicle speed exceeds a configured threshold, the gateway shall generate an overspeed warning condition.
Upon a change in overspeed warning status, the gateway shall immediately transmit the updated warning information to the instrument cluster.
If a door open condition is detected while the vehicle is in motion, the gateway shall generate a door warning condition.
Upon a change in door warning status, the gateway shall immediately transmit the updated warning information to the instrument cluster.
